ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Common name of the animal */,
  "reptile" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal is a reptile */,
  "cold_blooded" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal is cold-blooded */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the animal species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the animal */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the animal */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the animal */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the animal */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the animal */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* A more detailed common name */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the animal */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the animal */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the animal */,
  "lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the animal in years */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the animal */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Average weight of the animal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of characteristics */,
  "egg_laying" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal lays eggs */,
  "scales" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal has scales */,
  "poisonous" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal is poisonous */,
  "flight_capable" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal can fly */,
  "aquatic" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal is aquatic */,
  "arboreal" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal is arboreal */,
  "nocturnal" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal is nocturnal */,
  "migratory" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal is migratory */,
  "social" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal is social */,
  "domesticated" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal is domesticated */,
  "hibernates" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal hibernates */,
  "mammalian" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the animal is a mammal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_legs" (
  "legs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the number of legs entry */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the animal species */,
  "number_of_legs" INTEGER /* Number of legs the animal has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_legs_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_characteristics" (
  "rel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship between an animal and its characteristics */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the animal species */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set of characteristics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_characteristics_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characteristics ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_characteristics_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Research specialization of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* The institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the researcher's profile or CV */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the researcher's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the researcher's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the animal species studied */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher conducting the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the study began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the study ended */,
  "conclusions" TEXT /* Conclusions drawn from the study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the study */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the study has been published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was published */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of collaborators involved in the study */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the conservation status entry */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the animal species */,
  "category" TEXT /* Conservation category (e.g., Endangered, Vulnerable) */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date when the status was assigned */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the conservation status */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last review of the conservation status */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next planned review of the conservation status */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions for conservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_status_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat entry */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the animal species */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the animal's habitat */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the habitat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the habitat */,
  "water_sources" TEXT /* Water sources available in the habitat */,
  "vegetation" TEXT /* Vegetation in the habitat */,
  "human_impact" TEXT /* Impact of human activities on the habitat */,
  "protected_area" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the habitat is in a protected area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_habitats_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)
